commands.name: tb2_oracle_smoke
notes: Run this first on the Linux/Docker host to verify Harbor + Docker + TB2 access.

commands.name: tb2_claude-code_run
commands.shell_command: harbor run -d terminal-bench/terminal-bench-2 -a claude-code -m anthropic/claude-haiku-4-5 --env daytona -n 4
notes: Execute on a Linux/Docker host or with --env daytona; do not rely on macOS for every TB2 image.
If using a custom Agentica/VaG agent, register it with Harbor and replace -a accordingly.
Harbor task filtering is intentionally left in extra_args because the CLI flag may change.

execution_note: Run Harbor commands on a Linux/Docker host or via Harbor remote env such as Daytona. The macOS repo can generate plans and ingest results, but should not be assumed to build every TB2 image.
